task_scores.task_title: Migration with preflight, seed verification, post-migration smoke check
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Seed typo (e.g. tig=70 instead of 75) propagates to all TIG scoring; preflight/preview reduce but do not eliminate migration failure on large tables.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: preflight_migration.py is optional—bundle it as required run before alembic to catch read-replica/writability failures early.
task_scores.reasoning: Foundational; unlocks all threshold work; concrete verification (tig=75, stick=20, etc.) and DB writability check close high-impact migration risks.

task_scores.task_title: Threshold service fail-loud for known types, per-row try/except
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If known-type check has typo (e.g. 't1g' vs 'tig'), TIG sessions silently scored with MIG; per-row exception swallows corrupt row and leaves partial cache.
task_scores.reasoning: Fail loudly aligns with product values; per-row try/except prevents one bad row from breaking service; both changes are low-effort, high-correctness.

task_scores.task_title: Score API: reject <10 frames with 400, wire thresholds, active_threshold_spec
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Investor sees empty session return 100/100 without 400 guard; wrong thresholds (e.g. TIG scored as MIG) shown in WelderReport callout.
task_scores.reasoning: Directly prevents demo embarrassment; active_threshold_spec enables Replay micro-feedback and report callouts; 400 with clear message is investor-visible correctness.

task_scores.task_title: Admin thresholds page: Save loading/error state, re-enable for retry
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: 5xx or timeout leaves Save disabled; user assumes save worked when it failed; no retry path erodes trust in admin UI.
task_scores.reasoning: Standard UX pattern; operator/admin-facing; prevents dead-end on failure; verification includes simulated 500 and retry.

task_scores.task_title: Micro-feedback: thermal fallback 60/80, score fetch error UI
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: 20/40 fallback (legacy) misaligns with seed 60/80; TIG thermal feedback uses wrong threshold; score fetch failure shows blank feedback with no explanation.
task_scores.reasoning: Thermal 60/80 matches seed; scoreFetchError prevents silent degradation; both are correctness fixes, not new features.

task_scores.task_title: Demo callout: fetch GET /api/thresholds when mockScore has no spec
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Hardcoded 45° ±5° shown in demo when admin changed MIG to 50°; investor sees mismatch between demo and actual config.
task_scores.reasoning: Demo reflects real config; investor sees consistent story; low effort, high credibility.

task_scores.task_title: Conftest: WeldThresholdModel import before create_all; dependency override keys
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: Tests hit real DB when override key wrong; test_put_threshold_invalidates_cache passes for wrong reason; CI green but production breaks.
task_scores.reasoning: Explicit override of both routes.thresholds.get_db and routes.sessions.get_db closes flaky-test risk; session_factory assert on frames prevents false positives.

task_scores.task_title: AngleArcDiagram numeric verification; rollback procedure documentation
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: endAngle = angleTargetDegrees*Math.PI (missing /180) renders full semicircle for 45°; code revert without migration revert leaves schema ahead of code.
task_scores.reasoning: Arc math verification catches subtle bug; rollback doc prevents operator confusion; both are hygiene, not strategic.

critical_issues: Task 1 (Migration): Pre-flight script is optional—if not run, read-replica or >1000-row DB can fail at production; make preflight_migration.py a required gate before alembic upgrade head.

Task 3: Phase 2 order (2.1 → 2.2 → 2.3) is correct but 2.3 depends on session having 10+ frames—ensure generate_expert_session or session_factory is used consistently so score endpoint tests don't flake on empty sessions.
minor_issues: Thermal fallback 60/80 is documented in Step 4.2 but legacy 4-field spec callers might still pass 20/40—ensure all paths to generateMicroFeedback use spec values when present.
Flicker verification (Step 4.2) is manual; no automatable DOM assertion for CI noted in Known Issues.
suggestions: Add preflight_migration.py to CI before migration step: run it, then alembic upgrade head—catches writability/row-count before deploy.

In Step 4.6 conftest, add comment with exact override keys: routes.thresholds.get_db and routes.sessions.get_db—already in refined plan; ensure both appear in test_thresholds_api.py fixture docstring.
Document 'code reverted but migration not reverted' rollback in Pre-Flight Checklist so operators know to run alembic downgrade -1 when feature-flagging off.
dependency_order: T1 (Migration) before all—weld_thresholds and process_type must exist. T2 (Threshold service) after T1. T3 (Score API) after T2, 2.1, 2.2. T4 (Admin UI) after T2 API routes. T5 (Micro-feedback) after T3 (score returns active_threshold_spec). T6 (Demo) can run in parallel with T4. T7 (Conftest) blocks T3/T4 test runs. T8 (Arc verification, rollback doc) independent.
premortem_top_risk: Migration runs against read replica or sessions>1000 without manual UPDATE; preflight not run; alembic upgrade fails or locks table; entire plan blocked until DB fixed.
goal_alignment_notes: The three highest-leverage tasks (Migration, Threshold service, Score API) together establish configurable thresholds end-to-end. Admin UI and report callouts make this visible to investors. Demo uses real thresholds instead of hardcoded values. Plan serves 'closing investors and pilots' goal: technical credibility (correct scoring, no empty-session 100/100), forwardable outputs (WelderReport callout), and admin configurability. 48-hour visible output is achievable if Phase 1–2 ship first.
